phases.label: Level 1
phases.why: Q on every last-hit he takes — your level 1 poke is the best in the mage pool. Leave spheres on the ground; they're ammo.

phases.label: Level 2
phases.why: Q-E already threatens the stun — most mids don't respect it at 2 and pay a Flash for the lesson.

phases.label: Level 3
phases.why: Full kit: W-slow into QE stun into Q again is a half-bar rotation. The lane is yours to bully from here.

phases.label: Levels 4-5
phases.why: Splinter stacks build toward empowered Q — keep poking; every sphere thrown is scaling AND pressure at once.

phases.label: Level 6
phases.why: Unleashed Power online — count spheres before every trade: three-plus on the field means most mids die to R alone.

phases.label: First item
phases.why: Luden's spike: QE-stun into full rotation deletes squishies. Force the wave contact trades he cannot refuse.

phases.label: 2+ items
phases.why: Late Syndra is a one-button court-martial: flank, QE the carry, R the verdict. Spheres on the ground are sentences waiting.

phases.why: Q-E already threatens the stun — most mids don't respect it at 2 and pay a Flash for the lesson.

phases.label: Level 3
phases.why: Full kit: W-slow into QE stun into Q again is a half-bar rotation. The lane is yours to bully from here.

phases.label: Levels 4-5
phases.why: Splinter stacks build toward empowered Q — keep poking; every sphere thrown is scaling AND pressure at once.

phases.label: Level 6
phases.why: Slight deficit at the level-6 breakpoint: Pantheon's point-click spear bullying edge out your sphere-stun burst lines on the margins. You can still trade — just let him start the exchanges and answer on your terms.

phases.label: First item
phases.why: On first item the numbers lean his way — the point-click spear bullying out-tick your sphere-stun burst lines in even exchanges. Don't bleed for pride; take the trades his cooldowns hand you.

phases.label: 2+ items
phases.why: Pantheon's point-click spear bullying own this window — your sphere-stun burst lines don't answer them at two-plus items yet. Farm what's safe and let the next spike re-price the lane.

phases.why: Full kit: W-slow into QE stun into Q again is a half-bar rotation. The lane is yours to bully from here.

phases.label: Levels 4-5
phases.why: Splinter stacks build toward empowered Q — keep poking; every sphere thrown is scaling AND pressure at once.

phases.label: Level 6
phases.why: Unleashed Power online — count spheres before every trade: three-plus on the field means most mids die to R alone.

phases.label: First item
phases.why: Luden's spike: QE-stun into full rotation deletes squishies. Force the wave contact trades he cannot refuse.

phases.label: 2+ items
phases.why: Late Syndra is a one-button court-martial: flank, QE the carry, R the verdict. Spheres on the ground are sentences waiting.
